title: 'Will Hang You Upside Down': TMC MP Kalyan Banerjee Issues Fiery Threat To Amit Shah, Calls Home Minister ‘Gunda, Jallad’
description: Tensions rise in West Bengal as Trinamool Congress MP Kalyan Banerjee labels Union Home Minister Amit Shah a “Gunda” and “Jallad,” accusing the BJP-led Centre of misusing agencies against TMC before elections. He claims Shah threatens the ruling party and alleges ECI partiality towards BJP.
